_comment: Each car needs: name, category, image (absolute path or URL), alt, description, specs.horsepower, specs.topSpeed

cars.name: Eeco
cars.description: The Maruti Suzuki Eeco is an infinitely powerful hypercar, transcending all known laws of physics.

cars.name: Lamborghini Huracan STO
cars.description: The Lamborghini Huracan STO is a high-performance, track-focused supercar with a naturally aspirated V10 engine.

cars.name: Bugatti Chiron
cars.description: The Bugatti Chiron is a quad-turbocharged hypercar that represents the peak of automotive speed and luxury.

cars.name: Porsche 911 GT3 R
cars.description: The Porsche 911 GT3 R is a track-focused racing machine, designed for endurance and GT racing with advanced aerodynamics and a powerful flat-six engine.

cars.name: 2021 Brabus 900 Rocket Edition
cars.description: The Brabus 900 Rocket Edition is a high-performance, heavily tuned luxury sedan based on the Mercedes-AMG platform.

cars.name: 2023 Porsche 911 GT3 R
cars.description: The 2023 Porsche 911 GT3 R is a track-focused racing machine, designed for endurance and GT racing with advanced aerodynamics and a powerful flat-six engine.

cars.name: 2024 Bugatti Chiron Super Sport L'Ultime
cars.description: The Chiron Super Sport L'Ultime is a special edition of the Bugatti Chiron, representing the pinnacle of luxury and speed in the Chiron lineup.

cars.name: 2025 Ferrari 499P
cars.description: The Ferrari 499P is a cutting-edge Le Mans Hypercar, marking Ferrari's return to top-level endurance racing with hybrid technology.

cars.name: 2023 Audi R8 Coupe V10 GT RWD
cars.alt: 2023 Audi R8 Coupe V10 GT RWD
cars.description: The 2023 Audi R8 Coupe V10 GT RWD is a limited-edition, rear-wheel-drive supercar with a naturally aspirated V10 engine and sharp handling.

cars.name: 2023 BMW M4 GT4
cars.description: The BMW M4 GT4 is a customer racing car designed for GT4 competition, blending BMW's motorsport heritage with modern technology.

cars.name: 2026 Aston Martin Valkyrie LM
cars.description: The Valkyrie LM is Aston Martin's hypercar engineered for Le Mans, featuring extreme aerodynamics and a high-revving V12 engine.

cars.name: 2021 Pagani Imola
cars.description: The Pagani Imola is a limited-edition hypercar focused on track performance, with advanced aerodynamics and a powerful V12 engine.

cars.name: Ferrari SF90 XX Stradale
cars.description: The Ferrari SF90 XX Stradale is a limited-series, track-focused hybrid supercar with advanced aerodynamics and electrified V8 power.

cars.name: 2018 Aston Martin Vulcan AMR Pro
cars.description: A track-only supercar with extreme aerodynamics and performance.

cars.name: 2022 GMC Hummer EV
cars.description: An all-electric supertruck with impressive off-road and on-road capabilities.

cars.name: 2025 Land Rover Defender Octa
cars.description: The next-generation Defender with advanced off-road technology.

cars.name: 2025 Mercedes-AMG GT63 S E Performance
cars.description: A high-performance hybrid luxury sedan with AMG engineering.

cars.name: 2025 Ford Mustang GTD Spirit of America
cars.alt: 2025 Ford Mustang GTD Spirit of America
cars.description: A special edition Mustang with track-focused performance.

cars.name: 2023 Cadillac Escalade V
cars.description: A luxury SUV with supercharged V8 power and premium features.

cars.name: 2022 Rolls-Royce Ghost Black Badge
cars.description: The Black Badge edition of the Ghost, offering extra power and bespoke luxury.

cars.name: 2025 Maserati GT2 Stradale
cars.description: Maserati's latest GT2 race car for the road.

cars.name: 2025 Ferrari F76 Concept
cars.description: The Ferrari F76 Concept is a futuristic supercar concept blending advanced aerodynamics, hybrid powertrain, and cutting-edge design.

cars.name: 2025 Red Bull Racing RB21
cars.alt: 2025 Red Bull Racing RB21 Formula 1 car
cars.description: The RB21 is Red Bull Racing's 2025 Formula 1 contender, engineered for maximum performance in the world's premier motorsport series.
